hero.headline: Powering Dallas with Reliable Electrical Solutions
hero.subheadline: Whether it’s a simple repair or a full rewiring, our experienced team delivers safe, efficient, and affordable electrical services for your home or business.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Home Electrical Care
featureSections.body: From flickering lights to complete panel upgrades, we handle all residential electrical needs with precision and care. Our electricians are trained to work safely in your home, minimizing disruption while ensuring top-quality results.
bullets: Wiring and rewiring for new constructions or renovations
Outlet and switch installation or repair
Lighting design and installation (indoor and outdoor)
featureSections.cardBody: Every job is performed by licensed electricians following strict safety codes to protect your home and family.

featureSections.title: Reliable Electrical Support for Your Business
featureSections.body: Keep your business running smoothly with our commercial electrical services. We minimize downtime and ensure code compliance for offices, retail spaces, warehouses, and more.
featureSections.cardBody: We help businesses reduce energy costs with modern LED retrofits and smart controls.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured Professionals
whyChooseUs.description: All our electricians are fully licensed, bonded, and insured, giving you peace of mind that the job is done right and safe.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees or surprise charges. We provide upfront estimates and explain all costs before starting any work.

whyChooseUs.title: Prompt & Reliable Service
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your time. Our team arrives on schedule and completes projects efficiently without compromising quality.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer-First Approach
whyChooseUs.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We listen to your needs, answer all questions, and ensure you’re happy with the result.

cta.headline: Ready to Power Up Your Property?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free estimate and experience the TX Dallas Electrics difference.

servicesPage.intro: At TX Dallas Electrics, we offer a full range of electrical services for residential and commercial clients in Dallas, TX. Our licensed electricians are committed to safety, quality, and customer satisfaction. Explore our services below.

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Troubleshooting
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable repairs for all electrical issues, from flickering lights to breaker trips.
services.longDescription: When electrical problems arise, you need a trusted professional to diagnose and fix them quickly. Our team is experienced in troubleshooting a wide range of issues, including faulty wiring, circuit breaker failures, outlet malfunctions, and more. We use advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint the problem and provide lasting solutions.
benefits: Thorough diagnostics to prevent recurring issues
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
Safety-focused approach to protect your home

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the issue using specialized equipment to identify the root cause.

process.title: Solution Plan
process.description: We explain the problem and recommended fix, providing a clear estimate.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We perform the repair and test the system to ensure everything works safely.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service for emergencies. Call us at (469) 619-1729 and we’ll prioritize your situation.

faqs.question: Do you charge for estimates?
faqs.answer: No, we provide free estimates for all repair services. You’ll know the cost upfront.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Electrical Service
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for safety, capacity, and modern home needs.
services.longDescription: An outdated electrical panel can be a safety hazard and limit your home’s ability to handle modern appliances. Our panel upgrade services ensure your system meets current electrical codes and provides enough capacity for your needs. We handle everything from 100-amp to 400-amp upgrades.
benefits: Increased electrical capacity for new appliances
Improved home value and peace of mind

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current panel and load requirements.

process.title: Permitting & Planning
process.description: We handle all permits and plan the upgrade to minimize downtime.

process.title: Installation & Inspection
process.description: We install the new panel and pass all required inspections.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need a panel upgrade?
faqs.answer: Signs include frequent breaker trips, flickering lights, or using extension cords for major appliances. Call us for an assessment.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most residential upgrades are completed in one day, depending on the complexity.

services.title: Wiring & Rewiring Services
services.shortDescription: Expert wiring for new construction, renovations, or old home rewiring.
services.longDescription: Proper wiring is critical for safety and functionality. Whether you’re building a new home, remodeling, or dealing with outdated wiring in an older property, our electricians provide professional wiring and rewiring services. We use high-quality materials and follow best practices to ensure durability and safety.
benefits: Support for modern electronics and appliances

process.title: Design & Plan
process.description: We create a wiring plan that meets your needs and local codes.

process.title: Rough-In
process.description: We run wires through walls and install boxes before drywall.

process.title: Finish & Test
process.description: We connect outlets, switches, and fixtures, then test the entire system.

faqs.question: Do you rewire old homes with knob-and-tube wiring?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in replacing outdated wiring systems to improve safety and capacity.

faqs.question: Can you add new outlets during a renovation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can add outlets, switches, and lighting wherever you need them.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Beautiful and energy-efficient lighting for indoors and outdoors.
services.longDescription: Transform your space with professional lighting installation. From cozy indoor ambiance to stunning outdoor landscapes, our team designs and installs lighting that enhances your property’s aesthetics and functionality. We also specialize in energy-efficient LED solutions to save you money.
benefits: Custom lighting design tailored to your style
Increased home security with outdoor lighting

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision, budget, and preferences.

process.title: Design Proposal
process.description: We provide a lighting plan with product recommendations and layout.

process.title: Installation & Setup
process.description: We install fixtures, connect wiring, and test the system for optimal performance.

faqs.question: Do you install smart lighting systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install smart switches, dimmers, and integrated systems for convenient control.

faqs.question: Can you install outdoor security lights?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer motion-sensor lights, floodlights, and landscape lighting for safety and curb appeal.

about.headline: Your Trusted Local Electricians
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services to the Dallas community with integrity and professionalism.
story: TX Dallas Electrics was founded with a simple mission: to deliver top-quality electrical work that homeowners and businesses can count on. Our team of licensed electricians brings years of experience and a commitment to excellence on every job. We understand the unique electrical needs of Dallas properties, from historic homes in Munger Place to modern commercial spaces in the Design District.

Over the years, we have built a reputation for honesty, transparency, and superior craftsmanship. Whether it’s a minor repair or a major installation, we treat every project with the same dedication. Our goal is not just to fix electrical issues but to build lasting relationships with our clients based on trust and quality.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. Every job follows strict protocols to protect people and property.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We provide honest advice, clear pricing, and stand behind our work with warranties.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: We continuously improve our skills and use the best tools to deliver exceptional results.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We are proud to serve Dallas and treat every customer like a neighbor.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Have an electrical need? Contact us for a free estimate or to schedule service.
